title: Food Handling
description: Learn safe food handling practices to prevent foodborne illnesses.

steps.instruction: Always store raw meat at the bottom of the refrigerator to prevent cross-contamination.
Use a food thermometer to ensure meat is cooked to a safe temperature.
Never leave perishable food out for more than 2 hours.
Wash fruits and vegetables thoroughly before consumption.
Understand the importance of proper food storage and expiration dates.
